title: kbs show/update/close fail with 'project not initialized' in initialized Plexus workspace
description:
## Summary
In /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Plexus, read/write issue commands fail with 'project not initialized' while other commands (list/comment) work.

## Reproduction
1. cd /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Plexus
2. Run: kbs show plx-e41226
3. Run: kbs update plx-e41226 --status in_progress
4. Run: kbs close plx-2b0535

## Actual
Each command exits code 1 with: project not initialized

## Expected
Since kbs list/comment work in the same repo, show/update/close should resolve the same project context and execute.

## Notes
- Reproduced on 2026-03-05 around 11:30 ET.
- kbs comment works in Plexus at same time.
- In /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Kanbus, kbs create/list work normally.
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Acknowledged. I hit DeviceInUseError when launching kanbus_clock debug because another process was holding the Pixoo lock. I’ll pause until the device is free, then rerun kanbus_clock with --debug and validate descriptions. Let me know when the device is free so I can proceed.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Killed my stale kanbus_clock process (PIDs 50563/50564) that was holding the Pixoo lock. Device should now be free to run the debug clock.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Retested on 2026-03-05 11:45 ET. Still reproducible in /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Plexus:
- kbs show plx-e41226 -> project not initialized
- kbs update plx-e41226 --status in_progress -> project not initialized
- kbs close plx-2b0535 -> project not initialized
Also tested explicit scoping:
- kbs show plx-e41226 --project-root /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Plexus -> project not initialized
Context: kbs list and kbs comment still work in the same workspace.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Retest 2026-03-05 14:25 ET: still failing in Plexus.
- kbs show plx-e41226 -> project not initialized
- kbs update plx-e41226 --status in_progress -> project not initialized
- kbs close plx-e41226 -> project not initialized
- kbs show plx-e41226 --project-root /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Plexus -> project not initialized
Daemon status reports ok, but issue persists.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Update 2026-03-05 14:26 ET: Still reproducible from /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Plexus. Failed commands: kbs show plx-e41226; kbs update plx-e41226 --status in_progress; kbs close plx-e41226; kbs show plx-e41226 --project-root /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Plexus. All return: project not initialized. Impact: cannot transition/close issues from Plexus repo, only kbs comment/list work. Workaround in use: track lifecycle via kbs comment in Plexus and perform status transitions from /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Kanbus until root cause is fixed.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fix implemented in rust/src/file_io.rs: get_configuration_path now searches upward for .kanbus.yml from nested paths. Verified from /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Plexus after reinstalling kbs: show works (EXIT 0), update no longer returns project-not-initialized (returns no updates requested), and close on missing id returns not found instead of project-not-initialized.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Verification 2026-03-05 14:26 ET: issue appears resolved in /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Plexus. Commands now execute without 'project not initialized': kbs show plx-e41226 (success), kbs update plx-e41226 --status in_progress (success). kbs close on an already-closed issue returns 'no updates requested' (expected).
